reviews.comment:
Es larga la espera. Pero la atención es muy buena.

(Translated by Google)
The wait is long. But the service is very good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN0czZXenZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy pocos playeros que son super lentos, y los baños no están tan limpios como otras YPF, la verdad que se entiende por el movimiento que estén cansados los muchachos  pero los propietarios o administradores deben primar el bienestar de los viajantes ya que en temporada alta osea de verano eso es un hervidero y no podes tardar una hs y media para cargar un tanque de combustible.

(Translated by Google)
There are very few attendants, they are extremely slow, and the bathrooms are not as clean as other YPF stations. It's understandable that the staff are tired given the volume of traffic, but the owners or managers should prioritize the well-being of travelers, since in peak season (summer) it's incredibly busy and you can't expect to spend an hour and a half filling up a tank of fuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN0X0t1LW5RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Una falta de respeto al publico, un solo playero para tres islas vergonzoso

(Translated by Google)
A lack of respect for the public, a single beachcomber for three islands, shameful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN0OVBxYS1BRRAB

reviews.comment:
La verdad que me parece que podrían darle un poco más de Amor a esa estación...hay bastante limpieza en los baños y buena atención pero por estar tan alejada le hace falta algunas remodelaciones

(Translated by Google)
Honestly, I think they could put a little more care into that station...the bathrooms are quite clean and the service is good, but being so far away, it needs some renovations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzbHJLY2lRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buen servicio. Lugar para descansar luego de muchas horas de manejo.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. A place to rest after many hours of driving.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención.
El personal muy atento a las solicitudes del cliente.
Tuve que hacer fila para cargar combustible.
Muy recomendable

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service.
The staff was very attentive to customer requests.
I had to wait in line to get fuel.
Highly recommended.

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención. No hay wifi. No hay comida si paras a comer. Solo a los q se hospedan.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. No Wi-Fi. No food if you stop to eat. Only for hotel guests.
